items_all.title: Crypto trading app Fomo raised a $75M Series B led by Index at a $550M valuation, taking its total funding to ~$94M, and claims to add 3,500 new users per day (Ben Weiss/Fortune)
items_all.title_original: Crypto trading app Fomo raised a $75M Series B led by Index at a $550M valuation, taking its total funding to ~$94M, and claims to add 3,500 new users per day (Ben Weiss/Fortune)
items_all.title_en: Crypto trading app Fomo raised a $75M Series B led by Index at a $550M valuation, taking its total funding to ~$94M, and claims to add 3,500 new users per day (Ben Weiss/Fortune)
items_all.title_zh: 加密貨幣交易應用程式 Fomo 籌集了由 Index 領投的 7,500 萬美元 B 輪融資，估值為 5.5 億美元，使其總資金達到約 9,400 萬美元，並聲稱每天增加 3,500 名新用戶（Ben Weiss/財富）
